rationale: Educ. Code §39.264 governs use of monetary awards by schools and districts. It does not reference homestead exemptions, Tax Code §11.13, or property tax appraised value, so no conflict arises.
quote: In determining the use of a monetary award received under this subchapter, a school or district shall give priority to academic enhancement purposes.
_note: No textual or operational relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute.
